definitions: bleed：流血；渗出；逐渐渗入、蔓延到（常用作 bleed into）。

examples.text: And this tradition of using the melody to represent Chinese and Asian culture continued and eventually bled into pop music in the '70s and '80s.
examples.explanation: 这里的 “bled into” 不是“流血”，而是比喻某种传统或影响逐渐渗入、扩散到另一个领域；句中指这种旋律传统后来进入了 70、80 年代的流行音乐。

source.text: Why this melody came to represent "China"
